title: GSR No. 32 (E) dated 10.01.2003- Re-constitution of Committee comprising of members for the purpose of control and supervision of experiments on animals.

Special Secretary, -Chairperson/Member Ministry of Environment & Forests, CGO Complex, Lodhi Road, New Delhi. 2. Nominee, - Member Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Nirman Bhavan, New Delhi. 3. Nominee, - Member Department of Biotechnology, CGO Complex, Lodhi Road, New Delhi. 4. Assistant Director General (Animal Sciences),ICAR - Member Department of Agriculture Research & Education, New Delhi. 5. Director - Member Indian Veterinary Research Institute, Bareilly, Uttar Pradesh. 6. Vice-Chancellor, - Member Tamil Nadu University of Veterinary and Agricultural Sciences (TANUVAS) or his nominee, Chennai. -- 4 of 6 -- [ • H F T I I — - S F g 3 ( i i ) ] *7TCcT ^iT ^FalTO : STOTtJK11! 5 7. Vice-Chancellor, - Member Maharashtra Animal & Rshery Sciences University, or his nominee ~ Nagpur. 8. Drug Controller General of India, - Member Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Nirman Bhavan, New Delhi. 9. Director General, - Member Indian Council of Medical Research, Ansari Nagar, New Delhi. 10. Director, -Member All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Ansari Nagar, New Delhi. 11. Director, - Member Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore 12. Plant Protection Advisor, -Member Ministry of Agriculture, New Delhi. 13. Joint Secretary (Animal Welfare) Ministry of Environment & Forests, New Delhi. - Member 14. Mr. Balakrishnamurthy - Member Director, Indian Institute of Biotechnology and Toxicology (IIBAT), Chennai 15. Mr. K.M. Chako, - Member Dy. Director, Sriram Institute for industrial Research, New Delhi 16. Ms. Norma Alvarez, People for Animals, GOA. - Member 17. Ms. Sanobar Bharaucha, Compassion Unlimited Plus Action(CUPA), Bangalore. qiUSf**i-4. - Member -- 5 of 6 -- 6 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PARTlI^SEc.3(ii)] 18. Director (Animal Welfare) - Member-Secretary Ministry of Environment & Forests, New Delhi. 2. The Central Government hereby nominates Special Secretary, Ministry of Environment & Forests & Member to be the Chairperson of the Committee as per sub-section (2) of section 15 of the said Act. 3. The term of the Committee shall, unless sooner dissolved, be four years from the date of its constitution. 4. The Committee constituted earlier vide Gazette Notification No.S.O. 140 (E) dated 17.2.2000 stands dissolved from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette. [F.NO.25/1/2003-AWD] VEENA UPADHYAYA. Jt. Secy. Note: The following notifications were issued earlier on the composition of the Committee for the purpose of Control and Supervision of experiments on Animals:- (1) No.GSR 238 dated 8.2.1991 (2) No.7-7/94 AW dated 23.2.1996 (3) No.S.O. 140 (E) dated 17.2.2000 (4) No.S.0.547 (E) dated 25.5.2000 (5) No.S.O.894 (E) dated 7.9.2001 Printed by the Manager.
